default.heading: News Broadcast
default.body: Write a fake breaking headline, then turn somebody else's chaos into a complete TV segment.

default.heading: Pitch The Headline
default.body: Start by inventing one absurd headline on your phone. Keep it short, specific, and ridiculous.

default.heading: Swap Stories
default.body: Headlines get reassigned, so you will produce the segment for somebody else's breaking news.

default.heading: Build The Broadcast
default.body: Search for a visual, choose an anchor voice, and write the script the newsroom will read on air.

default.heading: Watch And Vote
default.body: The TV plays every segment. Then everyone votes on the funniest full newscast package.
